Notice Of Motion/Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To Ccp 1285
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LIQUID REALITY ADVISORS, LLC, and, SCOTT LANDRESS Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To CCP 1285. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition to confirm the Arbitration Award is granted.
